prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style illustration of a young working woman standing in the center aisle of a crowded Japanese hardware store, surrounded by tall shelves packed with packaged hand tools, pliers, wrenches, drill bits, power tools, price tags, and colorful Japanese product signs. She has long wavy blonde hair tied into twin ponytails with 2 large lavender ribbon bows, and wears a frilly lavender Victorian-lolita work dress with exactly 6 prominent outfit details: puff sleeves, lace-trimmed collar, large bow at the neck, vertical lace panel with buttons, fitted waist sash, and tiered ruffled skirt. Her face is fully covered by a plain centered square censor block in warm skin-tone beige, with no facial features visible. She holds exactly 2 cordless power drills: a teal-blue drill in her left hand angled slightly downward toward the viewer, and a red drill in her right hand angled outward to the side, both with black battery packs and metallic chucks. The background should show exactly 2 long tool aisles receding in perspective on the left and right, with dense blister packs and signage, including blue and red Japanese-style DIY/tool labels, creating a busy retail atmosphere. Use warm overhead fluorescent lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic perspective, glossy reflections on plastic packaging, soft golden rim light on the hair, intricate linework, painterly shading, and a polished GPT-image-2 anime illustration look. Keep the composition square, waist-up to thigh-up framing, centered character, dynamic but cute and hardworking mood, no extra characters, no watermark.
